title: Prem Adda
subTitle: Ranganath and his friends are small-time criminals working for a local politician. After committing a murder for him, they are betrayed by the politician, prompting the group to seek revenge.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati prepares herself to depart with Lord Shiva after their wedding ceremony. Meanwhile, Mainadevi becomes emotional and bursts into tears as she bids farewell to Parvati. Can Parvati console her before she departs?

title: Prayanikara Gamanakke
subTitle: A bus ferrying a motley of passengers gets hijacked en route to Hyderabad. Later, the police and passengers face multiple challenges to overcome the situation.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva's anger flares when Shambuki and Diti insult Goddess Parvati for her infertility and reject her blessings. Will the Goddess be able to soothe the furious Lord's temper?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati joins Lord Shiva on a pilgrimage to Amarnath, seeking blessings for a child. However, their journey is threatened by Tarakasura's malevolent scheme, as he sends Rahu and Ketu to obstruct them.

title: Maurya
subTitle: Manu, a kick-boxer must train and win an upcoming tournament to fulfill his mother's wishes and to become the best in the world.

title: Thangigagi
subTitle: Veerabhadra who loves his sister very much gets her married to a nice man. But when Veerabhadra's close friend is killed, he decides to wipe out anti-social elements in the city.

title: Naani
subTitle: Soon after moving into their new palatial house, a couple begins experiencing paranormal phenomena. An investigation leads them to the chilling story of the house's previous inhabitants.

title: Yuga
subTitle: An orphan raised in slums, Yuga wants to earn a lot of money but not at the cost of his moral values. After bashing the underworld don and his gang, he moves to a village and there he meets Harini.

title: Neelambari
subTitle: Vinod and his TV channel crew arrive in a village for a crucial assignment. A series of spooky events is set in motion after they interview a mysterious woman who lives there.

title: Sugarless
subTitle: Lovers Venkatesh and Mahalakshmi lead a happy life and are about to get married. But chaos ensues when Venkatesh is diagnosed with type 2 diabetes and decides to hide it from Mahalakshmi.

title: Sugarless
subTitle: Lovers Venkatesh and Mahalakshmi lead a happy life and are about to get married. But chaos ensues when Venkatesh is diagnosed with type 2 diabetes and decides to hide it from Mahalakshmi.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Parvati journeys towards Kailash alongside Lord Shiva, memories of her past life as Sati flood her mind, evoking a deep sense of nostalgia and reflection. Meanwhile, in the realm of the Asuras, a search ensues for a suitable bride for Tarakasura.

title: Rush
subTitle: James Hunt and Niki Lauda, two extremely skilled Formula One racers, have an intense rivalry with each other. However, it is their enmity that pushes them to their limits.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Tarakasura and his cohorts launch a relentless assault on Kailash, the Devas rise to its defense with unwavering courage. Will their valor and determination be enough to safeguard the sacred abode of Lord Shiva?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Tarakasura confronts Lord Shiva with the sinister intention of ending his unborn child's life, Lord Shiva is consumed with fury and issues a stern warning, foretelling unforeseen consequences. What unexpected fate awaits Tarakasura as he dares.

title: Neelambari
subTitle: Vinod and his TV channel crew arrive in a village for a crucial assignment. A series of spooky events is set in motion after they interview a mysterious woman who lives there.

title: Chanda
subTitle: Kariya, a poor man, lives with his mother who works as a maid. Problems arise when he beats up the son of a rich gangster from the village while defending his life.

title: C.B.I. Shankar
subTitle: When Shankar, a CBI officer, and his team reopen the murder case of Santosh, their investigation into the events surrounding his death reveal interesting facts about the murderer.

title: D/O Parvathamma
subTitle: CID officer Vaidehi, the daughter of Parvathamma, investigates a murder with several complex layers. However, through the course of the investigation, her past collides with the present.

title: Nanjundi Kalyana
subTitle: Raghuchandra changes his identity in order to marry his cousin to settle the family conflict between his father and aunt.

title: Kaafi Thota
subTitle: Kaafi Thota is a 2017 Indian romantic thriller Kannada film written, directed and co-produced by T. N. Seetharam.[1] Adapting a crowd-funding methodology, Seetharam produced the film along with 29 other donors under the maiden banner Manvanthara Films.

title: Kaafi Thota
subTitle: Kaafi Thota is a 2017 Indian romantic thriller Kannada film written, directed and co-produced by T. N. Seetharam.[1] Adapting a crowd-funding methodology, Seetharam produced the film along with 29 other donors under the maiden banner Manvanthara Films.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati rejoice as the ten Rishis prepare to perform the sacred act of circumambulation around them as a gesture of reverence. However Parvati's joy turns to dismay when Rishi Bhringi declines to pay homage to her, causing her to feel.

title: Ashtralle Just Missoo
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati fall in love at the start of the universe. Their eternal love story becomes a legendary tale of devotion for future generations.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shambuki's decision to deliver her babies alone adds to the tension for Diti and Tarakasura. Meanwhile, Tarakasura is overjoyed as the protectors of the Asura empire descend. The unfolding events are bound to shape the future of the Asura empire.

title: Nanjundi Kalyana
subTitle: Raghuchandra changes his identity in order to marry his cousin to settle the family conflict between his father and aunt.

title: Auto Shankar
subTitle: Shankar is an autorickshaw driver belonging to a middle-class family who gets into a conflict with Maya, a money-lender. However, tables turn when she loses her property and they fall in love.

title: Yuddha Kaanda
subTitle: A corrupt advocate falsely accuses a commoner of murder and sends him to the gallows. Eventually, the commoner's son becomes a lawyer and embarks on a quest for revenge.

title: Rakshasa
subTitle: A police officer is willing to cross any line to bring criminals from the underworld to justice and rid society of its evils.

title: Mandya
subTitle: Ganesh, also known as Eshwar, is compelled to move to the city after the bloodshed in his native town devastates him. When he returns years later, he adopts the task of educating people.

title: Mr LLB
subTitle: When Bhadra falls in love with his tenant Swara, he decides to woo her. However, before he has the chance to confess his feelings to her, he realises that she is his friend Rahul's fiancée.
